api_key.description: Gridly API key, sent as the Authorization header ("ApiKey <key>"). Never logged.

base_url.description: Gridly API base URL override for tests or proxies.

view_ids.description: Comma-separated list of Gridly view ids to fan out over for the records and branches streams (one request per id). Required for records/branches; not used by the views stream, which lists all views in one request.

max_pages.description: Maximum pages per view; use 0, all, or unlimited to exhaust each stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
